'''mawosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enameller|enameller]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enameller|enameller]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mawosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæwesheth|mæwesheth]] || [[word:mæweshej|mæweshej]] || [[word:mæweshesh|mæweshesh]] || [[word:mæweshe|mæweshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mawowoshoth|mawowoshoth]] || [[word:mawowoshoj|mawowoshoj]] || [[word:mawowoshosh|mawowoshosh]] || [[word:mawowosho|mawowosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mawoshoth|mawoshoth]] || [[word:mawoshoj|mawoshoj]] || [[word:mawoshosh|mawoshosh]] || [[word:mawosho|mawosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mawofshoth|mawofshoth]] || [[word:mawofshoj|mawofshoj]] || [[word:mawofshosh|mawofshosh]] || [[word:mawofshof|mawofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mawoshotho|mawoshotho]] || [[word:mawoshojo|mawoshojo]] || [[word:mawoshosho|mawoshosho]] || [[word:mawoshoko|mawoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mawoshoth|mawoshoth]] || [[word:mawoshoj|mawoshoj]] || [[word:mawoshosh|mawoshosh]] || [[word:mawosho|mawosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mawoshothol|mawoshothol]] || [[word:mawoshojol|mawoshojol]] || [[word:mawoshoshol|mawoshoshol]] || [[word:mawoshokol|mawoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mawoshothotho|mawoshothotho]] || [[word:mawoshojojo|mawoshojojo]] || [[word:mawoshoshosho|mawoshoshosho]] || [[word:mawoshoko|mawoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mawoshothon|mawoshothon]] || [[word:mawoshojon|mawoshojon]] || [[word:mawoshoshon|mawoshoshon]] || [[word:mawoshokon|mawoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mawoshothoro|mawoshothoro]] || [[word:mawoshojoro|mawoshojoro]] || [[word:mawoshoshoro|mawoshoshoro]] || [[word:mawoshokoro|mawoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
